Class SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource.AbstractMcpResourceMethodCallback.AbstractBuilder<SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder, SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback>
org.springframework.ai.mcp.annotation.method.resource.SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder
Enclosing class:
SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback
public static final class SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder extends AbstractMcpResourceMethodCallback.AbstractBuilder<SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback.Builder, SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback>
Builder for creating SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback instances.

This builder provides a fluent API for constructing SyncStatelessMcpResourceMethodCallback instances with the required parameters.

Author:
Christian Tzolov, Alexandros Pappas, Vadzim Shurmialiou, Craig Walls
